violations.description: HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): A hand drying device was noted not provided at the hand washing lavatory in the food prep area. Towels out
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted not properly labeled in the reach in coolers
IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): In - use utensil noted being stored with the handle laying in the meat sauces and other items or having no handles.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Reachin cooler/freezer interiors and exteriors fan guards and other equipment exteriors noted not clean
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors and walls under and around in place equipment noted in need of cleaning.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors and walls under and around in place equipment noted in need of cleaning.
TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): A covered waste receptacle was not provided in the employee toilet room.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Reachin cooler/freezer interiors and exteriors fan guards and other equipment exteriors noted not clean

NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Front serving counter noted not properly designed. Edges of counter top and base cabinets are constructed of an absorbent material. Edges of other shelving are also absorbent.
PREMISES (1 pts): Mops and brooms not hung.
